test.command: tmux -L svc_test kill-server 2>/dev/null || true && tmux -L svc_test -f /Users/ict/.config/tmux/tmux.conf new-session -d -s svc_test && tmux -L svc_test source-file /Users/ict/.config/tmux/tmux.conf && tmux -L svc_test list-keys -T prefix >/dev/null && tmux -L svc_test list-keys -T workspace_agent >/dev/null && tmux -L svc_test kill-server 2>/dev/null || true

typecheck.command: printf 'No language typecheck step defined for shell/tmux mission\n'

lint.command: bash -n /Users/ict/.config/tmux/tmux.conf /Users/ict/.config/tmux/tmux.reset.conf && bash -n /Users/ict/.config/tmux/plugins/tmux-workspace-agent/workspace-agent.tmux && for f in /Users/ict/.config/tmux/plugins/tmux-workspace-agent/scripts/*.sh; do [ -e "$f" ] || continue; bash -n "$f"; done

appliedUpdates.description: Added named commands `test_agent_picker` and `test_quick_relaunch` so agent-integration regression scripts are discoverable and repeatable via shared mission services.
Added `test_agent_integration` command to run both agent-integration regression scripts from a single reusable validator entrypoint.

rejectedObservations.observation: Feature-level regression scripts are not represented as named shared service commands.
